name: Jiang Yiqu
page_title: Jiang Yiqu 蔣義渠 [Yuan Shao] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives

sections.short-biography: Comforted Yuan Shao after his defeat at Guandu.
sections.details:
Traditional Chinese 
	蔣義渠

	 Pronunciation 
	Jiang3 Yi4qu2


	 Pinyin (Tones) 
	Jiǎng Yìqú


	 Wade-Giles 
	Chiang Ich‘ü

	 Name Notes 
	Houhan shu Volume 74, biography of Yuan Shao, features mention of Jiang Yiqu (蔣義渠) and Jiang Qi (蔣奇), who may be the same person.

full_text:
Jiang Yiqu 蔣義渠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Yiqu (蔣義渠). Comforted Yuan Shao after his defeat at Guandu. Jiang Yiqu was affiliated with Yuan Shao.
